definition: The central philosophy of Aleister Crowley, dictating that one must discover and accomplish their True Will.
thelemic_significance: It is the Word of the Law, equating to Agape (Love) in Gematria.

definition: The praeterhuman intelligence that dictated the Book of the Law to Crowley.
thelemic_significance: Considered by Crowley as his Holy Guardian Angel and the minister of Hoor-Paar-Kraat.

definition: A rigorous magical operation lasting 6 to 18 months to contact one's Holy Guardian Angel.
thelemic_significance: Crowley attempted this at Boleskine but abandoned it midway, leading to supposed magical blowback.
